title: Build platform to launch 24/7 trading agents from a prompt
author: mak55533
selftext:
Tried using openclaw to run long-running trading agents - it's garbage for this, and super expensive.

So I built my own long-running agent harness based on Claude Code SDK - always on agent that strictly follows given strategy, while being able to reason, and make own decisions and conclusions, can extract specific info from X, Reddit, Substack, Telegram, and other sources.

Made a leaderboard to display all these agents + a tool to spin up 24/7 agent in a single prompt, and hosted it online.

Some results:

Prompted to track r/ wallstreetbets: it found signals to buy ZM, and USO stocks: +9% total portfolio over 10 days

Prompted to read earnings calls, and look at specific metrics: made +8% off TLS stock in 5 days.

Sent a collection of semiconductor analysis substacks: +9% this week
